1002702878.english: Deals {0} damage with a railgun sniper.

1002702879.korean: 레일건을 충전해, 다음 공격이 치명타로 적용되며 일정 라운드 동안 공격력이 크게 증가합니다.
1002702879.english: Charge the railgun so the next attack deals CRIT and greatly increases ATK for a certain number of rounds.

1002703681.korean: 사망 시, 리액터가 폭발에 주변에 매우 높은 물리 피해를 줍니다.
1002703681.english: Upon death, the reactor explodes, dealing extremely high physical damage to surrounding units.

1002702880.english: On death, deals physical damage to surrounding units.
